mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TB_BOARDINFO WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY BBS_NO DESC) RNUM , BBS_NO , BBS_GUBN , BBS_CODE , BBS_TITLE , BBS_CNT , CONVERT(CHAR(10), BBS_WRITE_DT, 23) AS BBS_WRITE_DT FROM TB_BOARDINFO WHERE 1=1 ) T WHERE 1=1 AND RNUM BETWEEN #{startRow}+1 AND #{endRow} ORDER BY BBS_NO DESC

/* selectEgovSampleList */ SELECT startYmd , endYmd , auctAmt , auctCnt , bmsNo , defectIncludeYn , gradeCd , gradeNm , gradeType , judgeBreedCd , judgeBreedNm , judgeSexCd , judgeSexNm , maxAuctamt , minAuctAmt , sumAuctAmt , sumWeight , weight FROM AUCT_CATTLEDETAILPRICEDETAIL
mapper.update: WITH A AS( SELECT MARKETCODE , CONVERT(VARCHAR, H04) AS H05 , CONVERT(VARCHAR, X04) AS X05 , YYMMDD AS PREDATE FROM ANIINFONET.dbo.MC_COW WHERE YYMMDD IN (SELECT MAX(YYMMDD) FROM ANIINFONET.dbo.MC_COW WHERE YYMMDD < #{todayStr}) ) UPDATE MC SET MC.H05 = A.H05 ,MC.X05 = A.X05 FROM ANIINFONET.dbo.MC_COW MC JOIN A ON MC.MarketCode = A.MarketCode WHERE MC.YYMMDD = #{todayStr}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MC_PIG ( YYMMDD ,MarketCode ,B01 ,B04 ,B05 ,M01 ,M04 ,M05 , B02 , B03 , M02 , M03 ) VALUES ( #{auctDate} ,#{marketCode} , ISNULL(REPLACE(#{pigCnt, jdbcType=FLOAT},',',''), 0) , ISNULL(REPLACE(#{pigAmt, jdbcType=FLOAT},',',''), 0) , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 , 0 )
mapper.update: WITH A AS( SELECT MARKETCODE , CONVERT(VARCHAR, B04) AS B05 , YYMMDD AS PREDATE FROM ANIINFONET.dbo.MC_PIG WHERE YYMMDD = (SELECT MAX(YYMMDD) FROM ANIINFONET.dbo.MC_PIG WHERE YYMMDD < #{todayStr}) ) UPDATE MC SET MC.B05 = A.B05 FROM ANIINFONET.dbo.MC_PIG MC JOIN A ON MC.MarketCode = A.MarketCode WHERE MC.YYMMDD = #{todayStr}
mapper.insert: INSERT MC_PAN ( YYMMDD , MARKETCODE , PN01 , PN02 , PN03 , PN04 , PN05 ) VALUES ( #{auctDate} , #{marketCode} , ISNULL(REPLACE(#{verybig},',',''), 0) , ISNULL(REPLACE(#{special},',',''), 0) , ISNULL(REPLACE(#{big},',',''), 0) , ISNULL(REPLACE(#{medium},',',''), 0) , ISNULL(REPLACE(#{small},',',''), 0) )

INSERT MC_GG ( YYMMDD , MARKETCODE , GG01 , GG02 , GG03 ) VALUES ( #{auctDate} , #{marketCode} , ISNULL(REPLACE(#{big},',',''), 0) , ISNULL(REPLACE(#{medium},',',''), 0) , ISNULL(REPLACE(#{small},',',''), 0) )
